message:
test(resize): add 34 cross-module integration tests for resize/reflow pipeline (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Tests cover ViewportReflowPlanner→ResizeScheduler intent submission,
scheduler snapshot/lifecycle invariant verification, crash forensics
context building, memory-pressure policy adaptation across all four
tiers, screen invariants, phase transition validation, and six
end-to-end pipeline scenarios (full lifecycle, supersession,
emergency disable, input guardrails, starvation bypass).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
